query:
SELECT date, 'ERC-1155 (native)' AS label, supply_native_erc1155 AS value
    FROM dbt.api_execution_circles_v2_group_token_supply_daily
    UNION ALL
    SELECT date, 'ERC-20 (wrapped)' AS label, supply_wrapped_erc20 AS value
    FROM dbt.api_execution_circles_v2_group_token_supply_daily
    ORDER BY date, label
